modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble connecting to eduroam Wi-Fi in the dorms.

full_description_text:  
I can't get on the internet at all. I can see the Wi-Fi but it won't load any webpages, and Zoom keeps disconnecting. Sometimes eduroam doesn't even show up in the list of networks, but it works fine on my phone. This is really annoying, especially in my dorm room.
short_description: Trouble connecting to eduroam Wi-Fi in the dorms.
